Stub functions for Bluetooth driver connectability and support checks.

# Purpose
This code is a C++ header file that provides two functions related to Bluetooth Classic functionality. The function [`bt_driver_classic_update_connectability`](<#bt_driver_classic_update_connectability>) is defined but does not contain any implementation, indicating it may be a placeholder for future code to update Bluetooth Classic connectability settings. The function [`bt_driver_supports_bt_classic`](<#bt_driver_supports_bt_classic>) returns a boolean value `true`, indicating that the Bluetooth driver supports Bluetooth Classic. This code offers narrow functionality, focusing specifically on Bluetooth Classic support and connectability.
